description:
Goal
Enforce the telemetry contract that compiler2 jobs move computed state into world storage once and then re-borrow the stored value for telemetry or downstream use.

Scope
- code indexing / scoping publication
- activation analysis / return type / semantic closure publication
- any compiler2 publication path that preserves locals with clones only so later observers can read them

Contract
- define/store first
- telemetry observes the stored state
- local-before-store or store-and-keep-local clone patterns are removed

Validation
- targeted compiler2 telemetry-observed tests
- clippy sweep for redundant clone / unnecessary_to_owned
- full `cargo test --workspace` before close
title: Publish compiler2 state by defining once and re-borrowing
